mission_metadata.title: Operation: Narrow Wake
mission_metadata.description: A reduced-command naval wargame through a hostile strait, focused on escort, submarine detection, and timed extraction under pressure.

turns.title: Strait Entry
turns.context: A tanker convoy enters a mined choke point at dawn. Surface spacing and sonar discipline are critical to avoid early detection.

naval_officer.name: Close Escort Screen
naval_officer.desc: Compress the escort ring to keep the convoy inside overlapping sensors.

naval_officer.name: High-Speed Transit
naval_officer.desc: Push the convoy through the strait before hostile scouts can coordinate.

naval_officer.name: Wide Formation
naval_officer.desc: Increase spacing to reduce the chance of a single mass-casualty hit.

submarine_officer.name: Passive Sonar Sweep
submarine_officer.desc: Maintain silent listening and classify contacts before maneuvering.

submarine_officer.name: Periscope Check
submarine_officer.desc: Conduct a brief visual mast check near the chokepoint.

submarine_officer.name: Sprint Ahead
submarine_officer.desc: Move aggressively to scout the exit lane before escorts arrive.

turns.title: Suspected Mine Line
turns.context: A navigation warning suggests a fresh minefield has drifted into the channel. You need slow, deliberate clearance without losing momentum.

naval_officer.name: Mine Avoidance Plot
naval_officer.desc: Recompute the convoy route against recent drift and current data.

naval_officer.name: Hold Course
naval_officer.desc: Trust the original pre-briefed lane and minimize indecision.

naval_officer.name: Emergency Rudder Shift
naval_officer.desc: Order a sharp evasive correction on fragmentary reports.

submarine_officer.name: Seafloor Shadowing
submarine_officer.desc: Use bottom contour to bypass suspected mine clusters.

submarine_officer.name: Forward Scan Track
submarine_officer.desc: Creep ahead of the convoy and mark a safe underwater lane.

submarine_officer.name: Active Ping Burst
submarine_officer.desc: Use active sonar to force a rapid contact picture.

turns.title: Unknown Surface Contact
turns.context: A fast patrol craft appears on the radar edge without IFF. You need to classify it before it can shadow the convoy.

naval_officer.name: Challenge and Shadow
naval_officer.desc: Hail the contact while an escort parallels its movement.

naval_officer.name: Warn Off with Gun Mounts
naval_officer.desc: Train weapons immediately to deter an intercept.

naval_officer.name: Ignore Outer Ring
naval_officer.desc: Keep all escorts close to the convoy and avoid distraction.

submarine_officer.name: Trail from Below
submarine_officer.desc: Move under the contact and track its screw pattern.

submarine_officer.name: Acoustic ID Check
submarine_officer.desc: Classify the contact type before it reports convoy position.

submarine_officer.name: Set Attack Solution
submarine_officer.desc: Prepare a firing geometry in case the patrol craft turns hostile.

turns.title: Thermal Layer Break
turns.context: The submarine screen loses clean returns as water temperature shifts sharply. Contact quality is collapsing on both sides of the layer.

naval_officer.name: Increase Search Speed
naval_officer.desc: Expand the search area before the unknown contact slips away.

naval_officer.name: Deploy Flares
naval_officer.desc: Use visual illumination to compensate for bad sonar geometry.

naval_officer.name: Layer Compensation Plot
naval_officer.desc: Adjust the escort search pattern around the thermal break.

submarine_officer.name: Below-Layer Reposition
submarine_officer.desc: Reset depth beneath the thermal layer to regain contact clarity.

submarine_officer.name: Stay Shallow
submarine_officer.desc: Hold current depth to maintain rapid convoy support.

submarine_officer.name: Cavitation Burst
submarine_officer.desc: Accelerate hard through the layer and brute-force to the next station.

turns.title: Torpedo Warning
turns.context: A brief bearing spike suggests an incoming torpedo from the starboard quarter. There is no time for a full solution.

naval_officer.name: Convoy Evasion Turn
naval_officer.desc: Order a coordinated evasive maneuver across the convoy column.

naval_officer.name: Maintain Formation
naval_officer.desc: Hold station to avoid secondary collision in confined waters.

naval_officer.name: Full Ahead
naval_officer.desc: Increase speed and attempt to outrun the attack geometry.

submarine_officer.name: Counterfire Setup
submarine_officer.desc: Prepare retaliatory bearings on the suspected launch point.

submarine_officer.name: Decoy Broadcast
submarine_officer.desc: Emit acoustic deception to draw the weapon off axis.

submarine_officer.name: Torpedo Intercept Track
submarine_officer.desc: Rapidly mark the incoming bearing and refine the shooter location.

turns.title: Convoy Scatter Risk
turns.context: Two merchant hulls begin drifting off planned intervals after the evasive turn. If cohesion breaks now, the escorts lose control of the fight.

naval_officer.name: Reform Convoy Lanes
naval_officer.desc: Reestablish lane order and assign escorts by priority hull.

naval_officer.name: Release Independent Transit
naval_officer.desc: Allow each ship to maneuver separately until the threat passes.

naval_officer.name: Anchor the Damaged Hull
naval_officer.desc: Stop the slowest ship and build the escort plan around it.

submarine_officer.name: Outer Screen Patrol
submarine_officer.desc: Widen the submarine screen to catch the attacker on egress.

submarine_officer.name: Hold Screen Inside Arc
submarine_officer.desc: Stay tight to the convoy so scattered hulls remain covered.

submarine_officer.name: Independent Hunt
submarine_officer.desc: Break off from convoy protection to chase the firing submarine.

turns.title: Decoy Contact
turns.context: The contact picture splits into two nearly identical tracks. One is likely a decoy while the real submarine repositions for another shot.

naval_officer.name: Prioritize Real Contact Logic
naval_officer.desc: Filter the tactical picture against speed, turn rate, and bearing history.

naval_officer.name: Engage Both Bearings
naval_officer.desc: Split the surface screen and attack each possible track at once.

naval_officer.name: Shift to Air Watch
naval_officer.desc: Assume the undersea threat is masked and move focus to aerial surveillance.

submarine_officer.name: Signature Discrimination
submarine_officer.desc: Separate decoy harmonics from the genuine propulsion signature.

submarine_officer.name: Deep Chase
submarine_officer.desc: Commit to the deeper contact as the more probable attacker.

submarine_officer.name: Surface Mast Sweep
submarine_officer.desc: Use a brief mast exposure to disambiguate the geometry.

turns.title: Weather Wall
turns.context: A squall line closes visibility and raises sea clutter just before the breakout point. Navigation and handoff timing are both deteriorating.

naval_officer.name: Storm Transit Discipline
naval_officer.desc: Reduce speed and tighten reporting cadence through the squall wall.

naval_officer.name: Dash for Open Water
naval_officer.desc: Exploit the weather screen and sprint for the exit marker.

naval_officer.name: Heave To
naval_officer.desc: Pause the convoy until visual and radar quality recover.

submarine_officer.name: Ride the Layer
submarine_officer.desc: Use the storm noise to make a covert flank reposition.

submarine_officer.name: Maintain Station
submarine_officer.desc: Hold precise escort geometry instead of exploiting cover.

submarine_officer.name: Weather Mask Listening
submarine_officer.desc: Use storm noise as concealment while preserving acoustic watch.

turns.title: Exit Ambush
turns.context: As the convoy nears the final channel marker, a hostile fast attack craft breaks from coastal clutter. The convoy can still escape if the screen reacts instantly.

naval_officer.name: Protect Lead Tanker
naval_officer.desc: Collapse the screen around the convoy flagship.

naval_officer.name: Break Screen for Pursuit
naval_officer.desc: Send the nearest escort to chase the attack craft immediately.

naval_officer.name: Crossing Fire Pattern
naval_officer.desc: Set intersecting escort arcs to deny the attacker a clean run.

submarine_officer.name: Attack Craft Track
submarine_officer.desc: Fix the attacker acoustically and report a stable bearing line.

submarine_officer.name: Prepare Torpedo Shot
submarine_officer.desc: Shift immediately into weapon posture against the surface raider.

submarine_officer.name: Drop Below Layer
submarine_officer.desc: Hide from reciprocal detection and preserve the submarine asset.

turns.title: Breakout
turns.context: The convoy reaches the seaward edge of the exclusion zone. A final coordinated move is needed to hand off the merchants and keep the submarine screen from being cut off.

naval_officer.name: Escort Handoff Corridor
naval_officer.desc: Create a protected lane for the convoy to cross into safe waters.

naval_officer.name: Last-Ditch Barrage
naval_officer.desc: Commit all available weapons to suppress every possible threat axis.

naval_officer.name: Convoy Scatter Exit
naval_officer.desc: Order independent breakout courses to maximize survival odds.

submarine_officer.name: Rear Guard Position
submarine_officer.desc: Stay behind the convoy and cover the withdrawal route.

submarine_officer.name: Silent Withdrawal
submarine_officer.desc: Disengage immediately to preserve the boat after mission success.

submarine_officer.name: Confirm Clear Exit Lane
submarine_officer.desc: Verify no hostile submarine remains on the convoy's final bearing.
